Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jai Sen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Sen is a member of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Sen is a blood member of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen is a spearman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen has reached the threshold of Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen belongs to the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen is a member of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen uses a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen has an aunt who is a matronly woman at the entrance of an inn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Sen told a story about a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — Jai Sen is associated with the Jai clan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
